description: '''Indian pop music''', also known as '''Indi-pop''' or '''I-pop''', refers to [[Popular Music|pop music]] produced in [[India]] that is independent from [[filmi]] soundtracks for [[Cinema of India|Indian cinema]]. Indian pop is closely linked to [[Indian cinema]] ([[Hindi Cinema|Bollywood]], [[Telugu cinema|Tollywood]],  [[Punjabi cinema|Pollywood]] and [[Tamil cinema|Kollywood]]), [[Pakistani pop]] music, and the [[Asian Underground]] scene of the [[United Kingdom]]. The variety of South Asian music from different countries are generally known as Desi music.
